description: DNS verified for a www. subdomain (alongside the apex)

expected.subject: Your web address www.patsplumbing.co.uk is ready ✓
expected.body:
Hi Pat,

Quick update — your web address www.patsplumbing.co.uk is now hooked up
and ready to go.

In plain terms:
  • On your launch date, anyone typing www.patsplumbing.co.uk into a
    browser will land on your new site.
  • Your site will load securely (the green padlock
    visitors expect to see).
  • If you set up email forwarding on this address, that's
    working now too.

Nothing to do from your end — we'll email you again the
moment your site is live.

— ModuForge
